name: The Provisioner's Almanac, Volume II
description: A worn collection of Bree-land recipes beyond the basics. Found on the bodies of Rhudaur Men.

name: Wolf-Lore: Draught Preparations
description: Notes on compound draughts, in a hand not easily read. Taken from the Wolf-Master's cache.

name: The Houses of Healing: First Teachings
description: Introductory methods of the healers — athelas, poultices, and the care of wounds. Found with the Wolf-Master.
